---
title: "Institutional Members"
description: The OSC is supported by a growing number of institutional members from across the LMU. Institutional members are key partners in our efforts to promote open science and provide support to researchers at the LMU.
format: 
  html:
    css: styles.css
    page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div class="container inst-member-container my-3">

  <div class="row g-4 p-3">
    <div class="col-md-6">
      <div class="card h-100 border-light shadow-sm" style='border-top: 4px solid #00883A !important;'>
        <div class="card-body d-flex flex-column p-4">
          <h5 class="card-title mb-3 fw-semibold" style='color: #00883A; font-size: 1.3rem;'>Funding Institutional Members</h5>
          <p class="card-text">
            Funding institutional members provide the OSC with a yearly membership fee to get priority in our training programmes and consultations.
          </p>
          <a href="funding-institutional-members.html" class="btn btn-primary mt-auto align-self-start">
            View Funding Institutional Members
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="col-md-6">
      <div class="card h-100 border-light shadow-sm" style='border-top: 4px solid #00883A !important;'>
        <div class="card-body d-flex flex-column p-4" >
          <h5 class="card-title mb-3 fw-semibold" style='color: #00883A;font-size: 1.3rem;'>Affiliate Institutional Members</h5>
          <p class="card-text">
            Affiliate institutional members share the goals of the OSC and provide support in kind (e.g. infrastructure, services, collaborations).
          </p>
          <a href="affiliate-institutional-members.html" class="btn btn-primary mt-auto align-self-start">
            View Affiliate Institutional Members
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="container inst-member-container mt-3 mb-4">
  <div class="row">
      <h3 class="mb-2 border-0">Become an Institutional Member of the OSC</h3>
      <p class="mb-4" style="line-height:1.75; text-align:justify;">
        With a statement of commitment to work towards the OSC goals - LMU institutions can become Affiliate Institutional Members. Institutional Members are also encouraged to provide yearly funds to the OSC (depending on the size of the institution) - they then become Funding Institutional Members, which have additional benefits.
      </p>
      <div class="d-flex justify-content-center">
        <a href="becoming-institutional-members.html" class="btn btn-primary btn-pop">
          Learn More
        </a>
      </div>
  </div>
</div>
```
